title: Child Care Complaints - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Child Care Complaints 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF DEPARTMENT OF EARLY LEARNING AND CARE CHILD CARE LICENSING DIVISION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assures the safety of children in care by licensing child care facilities and assessing child care complaints against licensed providers. The Division has licensing staff statewide. Licensing staff inspect child care facilities, assess complaints against facilities, and provide technical assistance to child care providers. Families researching child care options can access child care safety records, including complaint and compliance history, emergency suspensions, and injury logs. 700 Summer Street NE Suite 350 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (800) 556-6616 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FIND CHILDCARE OREGON FIND CHILD CARE OREGON Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps families locate child care through referrals and provides resources to help make informed decisions about child care needs. 211info is available to provide families referrals to support their child care search, or families can conduct their own search on the website. Website Eligibility: Parents/caregivers of children up to age 18 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-11pm, Saturday-Sunday 8am-8pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details DEPARTMENT OF EARLY LEARNING AND CARE CHILD CARE LICENSING DIVISION
